title: Restart generation pipeline from a failed step
description:
When a generation fails at a specific step (e.g. image_generation times out, validation errors), there's no way to retry from that step. The entire pipeline must be re-run from scratch.

Add ability to restart from a failed step:
- Add a 'Retry from step' button in the audit detail UI
- Backend endpoint: POST /api/generate/{id}/retry?from_step={step_name}
- Reuse existing state (extracted data, research, prompt) and only re-run from the failed step onwards
- LangGraph checkpointer is already configured — leverage checkpoint state to resume
- Steps: orchestrator, extraction, research, prompt_generation, image_generation, validation, export
- Most common failure point is image_generation (ComfyUI timeout/connection errors)

title: More realistic faces in image generation
description:
The current FLUX.1-schnell Q4_K_S GGUF model produces decent but not photorealistic faces. Investigate options:
- Try FLUX.1-dev (higher quality, slower) instead of schnell
- Add face-specific LoRAs or IP-Adapter for face refinement
- Integrate FaceFusion client (already stubbed at imaging/facefusion_client.py) for face swap/enhancement post-processing
- Experiment with prompt engineering: add explicit face quality tokens (sharp focus, detailed skin texture, etc.)
- Consider increasing image resolution from 512x512 to 768x768 or 1024x1024 for better facial detail

title: Navigate generated and rejected images in audit detail
description:
Currently the audit detail page shows generation metadata but doesn't let you browse through all generated images (including rejected ones from validation retries). Add:
- Image carousel/gallery in the audit detail view showing all attempts
- Label each image with its validation score and pass/fail status
- Show which attempt number each image was (1st, 2nd, 3rd)
- Allow clicking to enlarge/zoom
- Images are stored in output/{request_id}/ directory, one PNG per attempt
- Backend already returns images via GET /api/generate/{id}/images
